title: Transparent Pricing.
subtitle: Pay exclusively for the resources you use with zero hidden fees.

recommendations.small: Perfect for small survival servers with a few friends.
recommendations.medium: Great for standard communities and light modpacks.
recommendations.standard: Ideal for large player bases and heavy plugins.
recommendations.heavy: Recommended for intensive modpacks (e.g., All The Mods).
recommendations.very_heavy: Massive networks and extreme performance needs.
recommendations.massive: Enterprise-grade hosting for the largest communities.

calculator.hourly_disabled: Hourly billing is currently disabled for {{game}} due to game architecture limitations.
calculator.configure_subtitle: Select your game environment and allocate resources.
calculator.no_card: No credit card required to register.

features.included_subtitle: Enterprise features come standard. No upsells, no hidden fees.

faq.title: How does credit billing work?
faq.answer: Spawnly uses a credit-based system. Purchase credits (1 Credit = €0.01) and we deduct them from your balance for every hour your server is <1>Running</1>. If you <3>Stop</3> the server, billing pauses immediately, but your files are kept safe for free.
